seo.meta_description: Bureau of Internet Accessibility (BoIA): Bureau of Internet Accessibility — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Manual + automated hybrid audit for ADA legal remediation
Continuous monitoring program for enterprise web portfolio
Accessibility consulting engagement ahead of product launch
VPAT documentation support for software procurement
Remediation roadmap prioritized by issue severity and volume

pros: Long-running accessibility consultancy with audit expertise
Mix of automated scanning and expert human review
Legal-grade reports for ADA and WCAG defense
cons: Services-heavy model, not a self-serve product
Tooling layer trails dedicated SaaS competitors
review.verdict: Credible consultancy for organizations facing ADA risk, but expect services pricing and timelines, not SaaS speed.
review.best_for: Organizations needing expert audits and legal-defensible a11y reports.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a CI-friendly automated a11y scanner.
